scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @trinix/shared && npm run build --workspace @trinix/api && npm run build --workspace @trinix/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @trinix/api && npm run test --workspace @trinix/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @trinix/api && npm run lint --workspace @trinix/web
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace @trinix/api && npm run format --workspace @trinix/web
